message:
test(fcp-core): add SanitizerReceipt zone authority and staleness tests (uek4)

Add 3 new tests for SanitizerReceipt verification:
- sanitizer_receipt_zone_integrity_requirements: verifies zone integrity
  ordering (owner > work > public) for sanitizer authority
- sanitizer_receipt_staleness_detection: tests timestamp-based staleness
  detection with configurable threshold
- sanitizer_receipt_future_timestamp_detection: detects suspicious future
  timestamps with clock skew tolerance

These tests verify FCP2 Spec requirements for sanitizer receipt validation:
- Zone integrity level requirements for clearing flags
- Temporal validity checking for receipts
- Attack detection for clock manipulation

Total tests: 576 (all passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
